NWEA 1000–1300L
DTR  |  Listen to a Classroom Conversation
LCC-HS9-L3-10001300-HSELA910-TTM-EUR-01 • HS ELA 9–10 • Seminal U.S. Documents

The Law Above the King

Click  🎧  to listen.
Listen to a conversation between a girl and a boy. Listen carefully. You will hear the conversation only once. After listening, you will answer some questions.
Listen to the Conversation
1QUESTION 1: What are the students planning to do for their project?
2QUESTION 2: Why does the girl want to focus on ideas rather than people?
3QUESTION 3: What does the boy suggest they do next?
Choose the best answer for each question. You may change your answers before submitting.
Answer all 3 questions to submit.
SMART SUPPORT:
Go back to the conversation. How does the girl’s reasoning connect her content choice to an expected outcome for the audience? What does that connection tell you about how she is approaching the presentation?
CA ELD PI.A.1, PI.A.3, PI.B.5  |  CCSS.ELA-LITERACY.RH.9-10.6  |  HS English Language Arts 9-10: Seminal U.S. Documents
